channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: RPI LGTBQ+ Taskforce & EMPAC Pride Celebration!
item.description: Get ready to celebrate love, identity, and community—we’re thrilled to invite you to our Pride Preparation Party on Friday, May 29th and to march with us in the Capital Pride Parade on Sunday, June 14th! Please fill out this form and share if you plan to join!
item.author: Community

item.title: JEC East-Side Elevated Walkway Closure – Effective May 26
item.description:
Starting May 26, the east-side elevated walkway and underpass between the Darrin Communications Center (DCC) and Jonsson Engineering Center (JEC) are closed for construction. Alternate pedestrian routes are in place, and wayfinding signage has been installed.

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Community
